title: MINI MOUNTAINEERS - 211info
text: BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES MINI MOUNTAINEERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects families with nature and each other. Provides weekly outings including trail hikes, park and play, kid-led walks, urban strolls, and nature scavenger hunts. 207 NE Park Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-5 Hours: Varies by outing Email (541) 426-9411 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 426-9411 Main phone Main phone (541) 426-9411 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit Facebook group page FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Baker and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm, Friday 8am-noon Services: Children's Play Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HARVEST SHARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTION MATERIAL GOODS - BABY RESOURCES PUBLIC SAFETY - CAR SEAT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
